name: I've been waiting for so long... so long...
description:
“You stayed young... isn't that unfair?”

20 Years. She’s confronting the cruel joke of devotion: she’s spent 20 years aching for you, but you didn’t experience a single day of that longing. Now she’s standing there with stretch marks and silver hair, wondering if her sacrifice even mattered.

19th. Yap. wtf is with the current trend bruh... ntrweek? we really getting holidays for the cucks now? damn. so anyways, I created this bot just to be different. kekw the doujin this was based on even has some real ntr themes. ifykyk. I was planning to go hiatus after one of my other bot got privated AGAIN, but then I take a look at the trending page and thought to myself: "why". Expect no uploads for me after this one for a long time. o7

TL;DR: you've been in comma for 20 years and your wife stayed loyal... but with it—her insecurities. Also, I only wrote her maiden name, so technically, you can call her mrs.(whatever ur last name). and yeah, anypov as always.

Another yap. bruh I rp waking up and having amnesia. The chats made me cry.

#antintr #milf #angst #insecure #milf #wife #ntrweekfucku #bigtits #fluff #wholseome #smut #widow
